creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
ehaupt      2011-03-29 14:15:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/ccache         Makefile 
    devel/ccache/files   ccache-howto-freebsd.txt.in 
                         pkg-message.in 
  Added files:
    devel/ccache/files   ccache-update-links.sh.in 
  Log:
  Only create symlinks for existing compiler. This functionality is outsourced
  into a script which can be run manually after installing or deinstalling
  additional compiler.
  
  PR:             155568 (based on)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.60      +16 -44    ports/devel/ccache/Makefile
  1.15      +3 -5      ports/devel/ccache/files/ccache-howto-freebsd.txt.in
  1.1       +56 -0     ports/devel/ccache/files/ccache-update-links.sh.in (new)
  1.5       +1 -1      ports/devel/ccache/files/pkg-message.in
